programme.desc: IPA & IPS tells about school children in choosing different school majors. There are two friends who choose different majors so that their friendship is split, even both of them make science and social science students enemies. programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 357-358
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 26
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 29
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: DUSTA DI BALIK CINTA EPS 63
programme.desc: When fate brings Kirana and Argadewa together unexpectedly, a spark ignites between the beautiful nurse and the charming football star. But a shadow from their past still lingers—will their love be strong enough to survive the truth?

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 3
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: KAU DITAKDIRKAN UNTUKKU 218
programme.desc: Alya is a tough, independent tomboy girl. He must care for his mother, who has kidney disease, in a life full of challenges. Alya must provide for her family's living expenses in addition to caring for her mother and nephew. After that, he endured difficult work and had to confront the sometimes-difficult realities.

programme.desc: When the Littles go to an orphanage to adopt a new family member, a charming young mouse named Stuart is chosen. While George is initially unwelcoming to his new brother, the family cat, Snowbell, is even less enthusiastic about having a mouse as his "master" and plots to get rid of him. Against these difficulties, Stuart resolves to face them with as much pluck, love and courage as he can muster.

programme.title: Best & Bester

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog
programme.desc: When Emily Elizabeth meets a magical animal rescuer who gives her a little red puppy, she never anticipated waking up to find a giant, 10-foot hound in her small New York City apartment. programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball

programme.desc: In "The World's End", Simon Pegg and Nick Frost reunite for an epic pub crawl that turns into a fight for humanity's future. Director Edgar Wright delivers a hilarious mix of nostalgia, comedy, and sci-fi thrills.

programme.title: The Legend
programme.desc: Martial artists join Red Lotus Flower Society to overthrow evil emperor. Governor hunts society members. Kung fu practitioner falls for merchant's daughter amid kung fu contest for her hand. Gender role reversal comedy ensues.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It's Sudden Death!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: Margaret Keane, a legendary painter, struggles to reclaim her fame after her husband takes the credit for her artwork.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: When a renowned novelist passes unexpectedly, a detective scrutinises the family, uncovering tangled relationships and hidden agendas.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A young boxer wins his debut championship and goes on to reach new heights of fame through his refusal to fight in Vietnam and other controversial actions.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Billy, a struggling single mother, gets pulled into a dangerous underworld while her son discovers a hidden underwater town.

programme.title: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Grant, a wanted man and a former member of the revolutionary militant group, the Weather Underground, goes on the run after a journalist reveals his identity.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Equipped with an elaborate plan, clear vision and unwavering determination, Richard Williams, a sports coach, encourages his daughters, Venus and Serena, to become tennis champions.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon, a symbologist, learns about the revival of a secret organisation aiming to destroy the Vatican, he immediately joins forces with a scientist to stop the attack.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: Jonas, a young man, trains under an elder in order to become the keeper of his community's memories. However, things get complicated once he discovers the sinister side of his city.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.

programme.title: In the Name of the King: The Last Mission
programme.desc: An assassin accepts one final job of abducting the daughters of a royal family. His life turns upside down when he is transported to the middle ages to fight an evil king and his dragon.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

programme.title: Vehicle 19
programme.desc: Michael Woods, a traveller and a parolee, picks up the wrong rental car to meet his wife which makes him the prime target of a group of corrupt police officers.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: Five years after saving the Lego world, Emmet must once again save everyone with the help of Rex Dangervest when new enemies from outer space attack them.

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong and a wisecracking detective from Los Angeles must overcome their differences and work together to find the missing daughter of a Chinese diplomat.

programme.title: G-Force
programme.desc: Armed with the latest high-tech spy equipment, a guinea pig and his highly trained team of rodents are sent on a mission to scupper the plans of a power-hungry billionaire from destroying the world.

programme.title: Mutant Python
programme.desc: A python is determined to exact revenge on a secluded village in the northern Fujian district of China after its altar is desecrated by a dead snake.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Covenant, a colony ship, receives a radio transmission from a planet, leading the crew to go on a mission to explore it. However, things get complicated when they encounter deadly aliens.

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters
programme.desc: Percy Jackson, a young demigod, sets off on a quest to find the Golden Fleece in the Sea of Monsters along with his half-brother, Tyson, and friends, Annabeth and Grover.

programme.title: Super Typhoon
programme.desc: A wrathful goddess unleashes a cataclysmic typhoon upon the world as punishment for humanity's transgressions. Panic ensues as people are forced to confront monstrous creatures amid the chaos.

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: An American historian and his friend embark on a mission to find a ship lost in the Arctic. However, complications arise when their financier turns out to be a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Black Widow
programme.desc: Natasha Romanoff, also known as Black Widow, an Avenger and a former KGB spy, must confront the dark past of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy tied to her past resurfaces.

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar, a chimpanzee and leader of the evolved apes, allows a human family into his territory. However, due to a vindictive bonobo, misunderstandings arise between the two species, resulting in war.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4
programme.desc: The annual All Valley Karate Tournament kicks off as several competing dojos vie for the grand championship - and settle some personal scores.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4
programme.desc: The tournament comes to a shocking end, with the aftermath leaving its participants reeling - and two champions facing uncertain futures.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: 34 years after losing the All Valley Karate Championship, Johnny Lawrence decides to reopen the Cobra Kai Dojo while his school adversary, Daniel LaRusso, runs a successful auto business.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Daniel is dismayed to find a new Cobra Kai dojo has been opened up. Johnny learns his dojo has to pass several safety requirements before he can actually start teaching.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Miguel helps Johnny advertise Cobra Kai on the web. Daniel agrees to chaperon at the Halloween dance so he can keep an eye on his daughter.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Robbie is in hot water with his father. Johnny plans to shut down Cobra Kai after Miguel is injured. Samantha and Kyler's relationship hits rock bottom. A vandalized billboard creates tension for Daniel.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Cobra Kai gains it's second student. Daniel has an intricate plan to get payback on Johnny. Miguel defends Samantha against Kyler during lunch break.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Johnny's dojo class attracts a group of misfits while his son Robby, who harbors ulterior motives, lands a new job. Samantha makes a new friend in science class. Daniel inspires interest in karate from an unlikely person.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: When Johnny learns Cobra Kai is banned from the All Valley Tournament, he faces the City Council. Miguel asks Samantha out. Robbie takes lessons from Daniel, just as his buddies plot a heist from LaRusso Auto.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Johnny prepares his Cobra Kai students for the next All Valley Karate Tournament and in turn, he is inspired to clean up his life. Daniel is still unaware of his new pupil's background.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: Louie's reckless actions forces Johnny and Daniel to go down memory lane. The Cobra Kai students plot revenge against the popular kids. Miguel grows impatient with Samantha.

programme.title: Cobra Kai
programme.desc: It is the day of the 2018 All Valley Karate Tournament and Cobra Kai is determined to win. Robbie signs up unaffiliated. A familiar face from the past returns.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Cobra Kai's win at the Under 18 All Valley Karate Championships, Johnny questions his dojo's philosophy and deals with a figure from his past. Daniel searches for the right way to respond to Cobra Kai's dominance.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: When Daniel starts teaching his first karate students, he questions whether he can fill Mr. Miyagi's shoes. Johnny invents some unorthodox training methods with help from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: Daniel pulls out all the stops in an effort to recruit new students to Miyagi Do. Johnny reflects on some of the major relationships in his life - and responds to Daniel's promotional efforts with his own.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: Daniel makes another attempt to promote Miyagi Do, and receives guidance in a familiar form. Johnny grows suspicious about Kreese's backstory. A new Cobra Kai student challenges Miguel and befriends Aisha, while Robby revisits a past he'd rather forget.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: Daniel struggles to help a new student learn. Miguel makes a new connection, while Johnny tries to repair a relationship. Tensions between the two dojos build to a breaking point.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: Daniel's students are given a lesson in overcoming their grudges. Johnny spends some time away from the dojo, while Kreese exerts his influence.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: To prepare his students, Daniel gives some new training methods a shot. Miguel puts a new lesson into practice. Johnny makes a tough but pivotal decision that affects Cobra Kai.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: Daniel works to make amends with Amanda, while Johnny is introduced to the world of dating apps. Complications arise when Miguel, Samantha, Robby and Tory cross paths.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: Johnny cautiously takes a stab at love, while Daniel and Amanda enjoy a romantic date night. An attempt to bring the students of the two dojos together backfires as hostilities between the teens escalate.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2
programme.desc: It's the first day of school at West Valley High but tensions between the two dojos have not cooled with the end of summer. And the rivalry between Daniel and Johnny comes to a head.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3
programme.desc: Miguel's fighting for his life, Robby's missing, and Daniel and Johnny's reputations are in tatters as the community reacts to the West Valley brawl.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3
programme.desc: Daniel and Johnny team up to find Robby. Miguel faces an uncertain future. Kreese tries to bring Tory back to Cobra Kai.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3

programme.desc: Dadang idolized a dangdut singer named Janet so much that he neglected his work. This of course made Dadang's mother, Ratna, upset and angry with her son's behavior. programme.title: Gak Bisa Yura, Soalnya Dia Cewek Misterius
programme.desc: The story revolves around the lives of Laras (Larasati Nugroho) and Wisnu (Kevin Hillers). Laras and Wisnu are two people who are sworn enemies and never get along. Wisnu and Laras are angry because Dayat's company is treating the villagers unfairly during the land acquisiti

programme.title: 3xtra0rdinary Love
programme.desc: Pelbagai rancangan di mana terdapat permainan dan rancangan bual bicara dengan selebriti

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Raja Pantun
programme.desc: Pantun pembuka bicara, dihoskan oleh Raja Azura. Dua kumpulan selebriti bertanding, masing masing menunjukkan taring.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Cuti
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Hubungan Jannah dan Puan Sri Rafidah semakin baik. Rasa terganggu dengan perubahan Zakri, Jannah berjumpa dengan Zarina dan memintanya untuk menasihati Zakri.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Selepas bergaduh, Jessie lari masuk ke hutan diikuti Shah dan rakan-rakan yang lain. Akhirnya Shah menjumpai Jessie tapi mereka terpisah dari lain. Di dalam hutan kelihatan seorang sedang memerhati mereka.

programme.title: 1 Hari Bersama Idola
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat peminat-peminat yang bertuah menerima kejutan dari selebriti kegemaran mereka.

programme.title: Konsert Yang Paling Padu
programme.desc: Program nyanyian dan bual bicara yang menghimpunkan 2 penyanyi yang dikenali ramai. Mereka bukan sahaja mempunyai persamaan dari segi karier tapi juga profil peribadi.

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show
programme.desc: Pelbagai permainan yang menyeronokkan & menarik yang dibuat untuk pasangan selebriti yang sudah berkahwin, tindakan dan jawapan mereka yang tidak dapat diramalkan melalui kuiz dan permainan fizikal.

programme.title: Solo Yolo : Checklist
programme.desc: Mampukah selebriti-selebriti ini melakukan cabaran yang diberikan kepada mereka mengikut bajet yang telah ditetapkan.

programme.title: Rasa Nostalgia Ramadan 3
programme.desc: Menyajikan hidangan istimewa dari nenek moyang mereka dan membincangkan makanan nostalgia ketika menjelang Ramadan

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Kemunculan semula Munirah mengejutkan Jannah dan Syawal. Munirah yang merasakan Jannah merampas kebahagiaannya datang untuk membalas dendam!

programme.title: Scammer Geng Marhaban
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mengupas bagaimana 2 beradik lelaki yang tak begitu rapat bercinta dengan gadis yang sama menipu wang ibu mereka.

programme.title: My Buskers
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mempersembahkan selebriti-selebriti tempatan menyanyi bersama-sama dengan buskers-buskers tempatan menyanyikan lagu-lagu popular.

programme.title: Aunty Reporting For Duty
programme.desc: Saksikan geng mak-mak melakukan cabaran yang menguji fizikal dan minda mereka. Mampukah geng mak-mak menyelesaikan misi yang diberi?

programme.title: Proksi
programme.desc: Sam, seorang penggodam elit bekerja untuk 'Cybersec Corporation' sementara rakannya Aman telah menggodam dan menjual data sulit kepada kumpulan penjenayah di Bangkok.

programme.title: Renovate
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Kemunculan semula Munirah mengejutkan Jannah dan Syawal. Munirah yang merasakan Jannah merampas kebahagiaannya datang untuk membalas dendam!

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Nikah, Cerai, Rujuk
programme.desc: Hanna kecil hati dengan keluarga suaminya apabila ibu mertuanya sering sahaja mencari salahnya dan Adam pula tidak cuba untuk mempertahankan dia.

programme.title: Halal Maps
programme.desc: Menampilkan sajian kulinari seluruh dunia, Halal Maps menemui penduduk tempatan yang berkongsi hidangan Halal kegemaran di bandar mereka, di mana mendapatkannya dan bagaimana menuju ke sana.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: DAYA, NADIA dan JESSIE adalah 3 sahabat baik sejak sekolah menengah. Mereka bergerak ke satu wellness resort sebagai satu break dari masalah hidup. Daya cuba nak balik sebab kerja, tetapi dia dihalang.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Gadis-gadis itu cuba menyesuaikan diri dengan program itu tetapi mereka masih rasa kekok. Mereka dipujuk untuk duduk di resort oleh kawan mereka yang lain, SHAH dan AZRI yang baru sampai ke resort.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Nadia mendapat imbasan masa silam mengenai keguguran anak dia dan Jessie dihantui oleh gadis bermata merah. Jessie dan Shah bertekar pasal business. Daya mendapat satu kejutan yang mengerunkan.

programme.title: Persepsi
